nasb.text: He said, “They were my brothers, the sons of my mother. As the Lord lives, if only you had let them live, I would not kill you.”

esv.text: And he said, “They were my brothers, the sons of my mother. As the Lord lives, if you had saved them alive, I would not kill you.”

cnv.text: 基甸說：“他們是我的兄弟，是我母親的兒子；我指著永活的耶和華起誓，如果你們從前讓他們存活，我現在就不殺你們了。”

ccb.text: 基甸说：“他们是我同母所生的兄弟，我凭永活的耶和华起誓，如果你们当初不杀他们，今天我就不杀你们了。”
